name: AuditBoard GRC API
what_it_does: AuditBoard REST API for enterprise audit management and GRC platform. Enables AI agents to retrieve audit findings and recommendations, track risk assessments, access control testing results, manage compliance tasks, and integrate AuditBoard data into enterprise risk and compliance reporting workflows. AuditBoard is widely used by public companies for SOX, internal audit, and enterprise risk management.
use_cases: Retrieving audit findings and remediation status from compliance monitoring agents
Tracking risk assessment results from enterprise risk management agents
Accessing SOX control testing results from financial compliance agents
Integrating AuditBoard audit data into board reporting and executive dashboard agents
not_for: SMB compliance without public company audit requirements
Automated audit finding generation (human auditor judgment required)
best_when: A public company or large enterprise using AuditBoard for SOX compliance and internal audit wants AI agents to monitor findings, track remediation, and integrate audit results into risk reporting.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Audit findings and risk assessments are highly sensitive, often material information. Strict access controls required. SOX-related data has legal significance.

auth.notes: AuditBoard API access via API key or OAuth. Enterprise access required. Contact AuditBoard for API integration setup. Documentation is private for enterprise customers.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise GRC platform with module-based pricing
pricing.notes: Enterprise-only platform targeting public companies and large enterprises. Pricing per module.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise rate limits; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: SOX audit findings and material risk data require strict access controls
No public MCP server — enterprise API access only
API documentation private — enterprise customers only; contact AuditBoard for access
Audit findings may be material non-public information — handle with legal guidance
AuditBoard's data model (OpsAudit, RiskOversight, SOXHUB, CrossComply) requires module-specific knowledge
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: SOX and audit findings may be MNPI. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Enterprise-only private API. EU data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: SOX audit data and material risk assessments. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Enterprise-only API.
